message:
perf(runtime): migrate scheduler, builder, and task infrastructure to parking_lot

three_lane: Rename ParkingMutex alias to just Mutex now that all Mutex
usage is parking_lot. Remove std::sync::Mutex from imports. Remove ~25
.expect("local scheduler lock poisoned"), .expect("runtime state lock
poisoned"), and .expect("task table lock poisoned") calls throughout
ThreeLaneScheduler and ThreeLaneWorker. Replace match-Ok/Err patterns
in CancelLaneWaker::wake() and ThreeLaneLocalCancelWaker::wake() with
direct .read() calls. Simplify local.lock().map_or() to block-scoped
lock in the parking path. Remove .expect() from ~15 test helper sites.

worker: Collapse if-let-Ok(write) in consume_cancel_ack to direct
write() for cancel acknowledgement reset.

builder: Migrate JoinState Mutex and MutexGuard imports to parking_lot.
Simplify lock_state() from match-Ok/poisoned-into_inner to direct
.lock(), eliminating the poison recovery path entirely.

deadline_monitor: Replace if-let-Ok(read) in deadline scan with direct
.read(). Migrate test imports from std RwLock to parking_lot. Collapse
if-let-Ok(write) in test checkpoint update to direct .write().

spawn_blocking: Migrate BlockingOneshot from std Mutex, removing
.unwrap() on lock() calls in send() and poll(). Remove two
.expect("spawn_blocking_on_thread fn lock poisoned") calls in thread
spawn paths.

task_handle: Replace abort_with_reason() match-Ok/Err pattern with
block-scoped direct .write(). Simplify closed_reason() from
and_then(read().ok().and_then(..)) to and_then(read().cancel_reason).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
